try:
    resp = requests.get(url, headers=headers, timeout=15)
    print(f"Status: {resp.status_code}")
    
    if resp.status_code == 200:
        root = ET.fromstring(resp.text)
        items = root.findall('.//item')
        print(f"Found {len(items)} items\n")
        
        for item in items[:10]:
            title = item.find('title')
            desc = item.find('description')
            title_text = unescape(title.text) if title is not None else ""
            desc_text = unescape(desc.text) if desc is not None else ""
            
            # 检查是否包含comparable sales信息
            if 'comparable' in title_text.lower() or 'same store' in title_text.lower():
                print(f"[MATCH] {title_text[:100]}")
                print(f"  {desc_text[:200]}")
                print()
except Exception as e:
    print(f"Error: {e}")

# 尝试直接搜索2025年2月发布的财报（同店销售数据）
print("\n=== Searching for Feb 2025 earnings (FY2024 Q4) ===")
url2 = "https://www.bing.com/news/search?q=Floor+Decor+February+2025+earnings+comparable+store+sales&format=rss"

resp2 = requests.get(url2, headers=headers, timeout=15)
if resp2.status_code == 200:
    root2 = ET.fromstring(resp2.text)
    items2 = root2.findall('.//item')
    for item in items2[:5]:
        title = item.find('title')
        print(f"- {unescape(title.text) if title is not None else ''[:120]}")
